canonicalTerms.definition: Total monthly gross income across all household members per 7 CFR §273.10(d).
canonicalTerms.studioPlainEnglishProjection: How much money the household earns each month before taxes

canonicalTerms.definition: Number of persons in the household per 7 CFR §273.1(a).
canonicalTerms.studioPlainEnglishProjection: How many people live together as one household

canonicalTerms.definition: Language spoken in the household most often. Drives notice-translation requirements per state §8.7.
Studio PolicyObject kind for due-process notice obligations.
canonicalTerms.studioPlainEnglishProjection: What the agency MUST tell the applicant

entries.rationale: Workspace adopts the federal canonical term verbatim.
